metadata.description: Claude Code tooling for benchmarking, generating, and restructuring a repo's AI context configuration.

plugins.name: claude-god
plugins.description: Benchmark, generate, and restructure a repo's Claude context config. Skills: config-bench (A/B-benchmark two configs, or score one), quizgen (draft a benchmark corpus), config-refactor (slim CLAUDE.md without losing rules). Bundles the claude-benchmark CLI, auto-downloaded on first use.
